name: local-real-world-books
description: Optional local reading PDFs used for every-page renderer and GUI display confidence. The PDFs are not committed; run scripts/setup-local-real-world-corpus.sh on Marc's machine to copy local personal/reference copies into test-pdfs/local-real-world.
licenseBasis: Local personal/reference copies only; do not commit or redistribute these PDFs from the repository.

documents.title: Business Success with Open Source
documents.author: VM (Vicky) Brasseur
documents.licenseBasis: Local personal/reference copy; not redistributed by pdfe.

documents.title: Producing Open Source Software - How to Run a Successful Free Software Project
documents.author: Karl Fogel
documents.licenseBasis: Local reference copy; not redistributed by pdfe.

documents.title: A Legal Issues Primer for Open Source and Free Software Projects
documents.author: Richard Fontana, Bradley M. Kuhn, Eben Moglen, Matthew Norwood, Daniel B. Ravicher, Karen Sandler, James Vasile, Aaron Williamson
documents.licenseBasis: Local reference copy; not redistributed by pdfe.
